original_idea: Require scope discovery before AgileForge accepts new project scope.

content.summary: Codex runs grill-with-docs and to-prd. AgileForge stores artifacts, validates producer provenance, and gates promotion into accepted scope.
settled_decisions: grill-with-docs is the required challenge producer for new scope.
to-prd is the required PRD producer after challenge readiness.
Challenge Artifacts and PRDs are stored in AgileForge-owned state, not treated as loose markdown workflow state.
Accepted Authority remains the only source for executable backlog, roadmap, story, task, and sprint work.
non_goals: Do not use Matt Pocock's to-issues to generate AgileForge executable work.
Do not let PRD drafts or Spec Amendment Drafts bypass human acceptance gates.
risks: AgileForge core should validate required producer provenance without embedding interactive skill execution.
